name: a2a-router
description: Public MCP Streamable HTTP bridge for a2a-router. It exposes project status, signed Trust-Pledge metadata, A2A invocation, MCP tool discovery, and MCP tool invocation for public HTTPS targets.

provider.name: shufflethis
provider.contact: X DM preferred; no public email is published.

tools.name: a2a_router.status
tools.description: Return current live status, endpoints, guardrails, and planned features.

tools.name: a2a_router.trust_pledge
tools.description: Return public Trust-Pledge URL, DID URL, JWKS URL, and self-attestation metadata.

tools.name: a2a_router.call_a2a_agent
tools.description: Invoke SendMessage on a public HTTPS A2A JSON-RPC endpoint or Agent Card URL.

tools.name: a2a_router.list_mcp_tools
tools.description: List tools from a public HTTPS MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint.

tools.name: a2a_router.call_mcp_tool
tools.description: Invoke a named tool on a public HTTPS MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint.

x-contributions.note: Financial contributions do not affect Trust-Pledge audit status, bridge routing, or future listing decisions.
